text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship is injured, so I bring her to the
infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Damage minimal. Mission can be resumed at will. Awaiting commander's orders. Beep, beep.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Commencing secondary scan... Beep. Mission can be resumed at will. Requesting new orders.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh, c'mon! I'm fine, I tell you!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Now they're official orders? Drat. Can't override
those even if I wanted to...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Sigh. Order acknowledged. Prioritizing repairs... Beep, beep, beep...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship isn't happy about being put on bed rest
for a few days and goes wild once she makes a
full recovery.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Suggestion approved. Golshiroid, initiating
upgrade sequence!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What gives?! Everything was fine just a second
ago...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Great, now I'm just a pile of scrap. Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her self-diagnostics clearly didn't produce good
results, because she suddenly gets eerily quiet.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Approved. The current operating program can
only be upgraded under one condition.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Beep-beep. Ice cream from the school store is required to upgrade Golshiroid. Otherwise, update will be postponed indefinitely.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no getting around it. I accept her
condition, and then two of us rework her training
schedule.
